_comment: Frappe-specific hook entries. Merge these into the root hooks/hooks.json PostToolUse section.

hooks.description: Frappe: detect SQL injection in Python files after edit
Frappe: warn if frappe.db.commit() found inside validate() method
Frappe: warn on get_doc() inside a for loop (N+1 query)
Frappe: warn on whitelist without has_permission
Frappe: warn if editing frappe/ or erpnext/ source directly

hooks.command: echo '[Frappe Hook] CRITICAL: Editing frappe/erpnext source directly. Use hooks.py doc_events, Custom Fields, and doctype_js overrides instead.' >&2; exit 2
